title: Quantification of ARF-GTP in HepG2 by pulldown with GST-GGA3(1-316)
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"vtfor","text":"G-proteins are small regulatory switches that exist in two states: a GTP-bound “on” state, and a GDP-bound “off” state. Methods for determining the activation state of G-proteins are important for understanding G-protein controlled signaling networks.\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"iaurr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lci6h","text":"An important class of G-proteins are ADP-ribosylation factors (ARFs), which regulate cytoskeletal organization, integrin activation or signalling. Cytohesins are known activators of ARFs which catalyze the exchange of ARF-bound GDP for GTP; thus, cytohesin inhibition leads to ARFs remaining in the GDP-bound “off” state. \r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lx9fg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gawl0","text":"SecinH3 is a small organic molecule that inhibits the cytohesin class of small (~47 kDa) GEFs. Its application in HepG2 cells suppresses insulin signaling; in mice it causes hepatic insulin resistance. \r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3g4zp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tj2vq","text":"Here we describe the procedure we used to quantify the amount of activated ARF after stimulation with insulin and incubation with SecinH3, i.e. the amount of ARF loaded with GTP, by pulldown with the N-terminal 316 amino acids of GGA3, a protein that specifically binds to ARF-GTP and not to ARF-GDP.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8sjcf","text":"Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"s25z4","text":"HepG2 cells grown to 75-80% confluence\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ftoh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dj9br","text":"GST-GGA3(1-316) expressed from a pGEx4T1 and immobilized on glutathione beads \r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vaya5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3osbj","text":"SecinH3 (100 mM in DMSO)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"t43tv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vptnp","text":"D5 (negative control, 10 mM in DMSO)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jtl7l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rtwgb","text":"Insulin (1.7 mM; Sigma)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uud1n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"iti7u","text":"lysis buffer (200 mM NaCl, 50 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 10 mM MgCl2, 1% Triton X-100, 0.1% SDS, 0.5% deoxycholate, 5% glycerol, protease inhibitor mix (Serva))\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":60,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fwwk4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cq5f5","text":"anti-ARF6 mAb (Santa Cruz, sc-7971)\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8opzk","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"arbr3","text":"standard cell culture material and media\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"q9xlo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6sbfy","text":"standard western-blotting material","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dskbq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"esqzj","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a7bkc","text":"Standard cell culture equipment\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uwhxc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wmn6g","text":"Standared western blotting equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 10 7 cells seeded into five 120 mm cell culture dishes and incubated overnight at 37°C, 5% CO 2 in full medium (EMEM/10% FCS)
cells washed twice with PBS and medium exchanged for EMEM w/o FCS
grown overnight
inhibitors added to dishes and further incubated for 3 hrs at 37°C, 5% CO 2 : dishes 1 and 2: 0.2% DMSO; dish 3: SecinH3 12.5 µM; dish 4: SecinH3 6.25 µM; dish 5: D5 25 µM
stimulation with 100 nM insulin 10’ at 37°C
cells washed twice with ice cold PBS
cells harvested with rubber policeman in 1.5 mL lysis buffer
incubated 20’ on ice
sonicated 7’’’, 40%, cycle 50
centrifuged 10’ at max. speed, 4 °C
1200 µL supernatant incubated with GST-GGA3 beads (50 µg GST-GGA3(1-316) per tube)
incubated 2 hrs at 4 °C under mild agitation
centrifuged for 1’ at 500 x g and supernatant discarded
pellets washed 3x with lysis buffer
50 µL Laemmli loading buffer added to pellet and incubated 5’ @ 95 °C
proteins separated by 15% SDS-PAGE; loading normalized to protein content in cell lysates
blotted on nitrocellulose with semi-dry blotting method
nitrocellulose blocked for 20’ with 5% milk powder in TBS/0.1% Tween-20
nitrocellulose washed twice with TBST
Anti-ARF6-antibody (1:100 dilution in 5% BSA/TBST) added and incubated overnight at 4 °C
nitrocellulose washed three times with TBST
goat-anti-mouse-HRP conjugate (1:20,000 dilution in 5% milk powder/TBST) added and incubated for one hr at RT
nitrocellulose washed with TBST
nitrocellulose covered with ECL-solution, incubated 3 min at RT; luminescence visualized with VersaDoc 5000 (BioRad)
Approx 3 days
Inhibition of cytohesins by SecinH3 leads to hepatic insulin resistance by Hafner, M. et al. published in Nature on 17 Nov, 2006 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/nature05415
creator: Protocols Importer
